comment.body: you need to buy the data from CBOE and other exchanges. You are not going to be able to accurately gauge MM exposure based on greeks and simple orderflow monitoring. These MM's trade through CBOE, CME, NASDAQ, etc. they have the EXACT data in terms of not only MM, but dealer, institutional, and retail positioning. It is worth them money if you will be able to understand what the hell you're looking at and extrapolate patterns and trends from said data
